prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan metal sphere
  - obj_1: large cyan metal cube
  - obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small green metal sphere
  - obj_4: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_7: large cyan metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0141] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0142] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0143] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0144] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0145] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0146] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0147] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0148] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0149] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0150] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0151] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0152] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0153] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0154] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0155] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0156] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0157] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0158] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0159] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0160] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in the scene. Let me carefully examine the images to estimate positions.

From the images, I can identify the objects and their approximate 3D positions:
- obj_0: large cyan metal sphere (left-back area)
- obj_1: large cyan metal cube (center area)
- obj_2: large brown rubber sphere (center)
- obj_3: small green metal sphere (front-center)
- obj_4: small blue metal cylinder (front-right or front-left depending on image)
- obj_5: large red rubber cylinder (front area)
- obj_6: small purple metal sphere (right or back)
- obj_7: large cyan metal sphere (right area)

Let me re-examine the multiple views more carefully to estimate positions:

Looking at the images collectively:
- obj_1 (cyan cube): center-left area
- obj_6 (purple sphere): right side, slightly forward
- obj_3 (green sphere): front-center area
- obj_4 (blue cylinder): front area
- obj_5 (red cylinder): front-right or front area
- obj_7 (cyan sphere right): right-center
- obj_2 (brown sphere): center

Let me estimate distances for each question:

[qrr_0141] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_1 to obj_6 seems moderate; obj_3 to obj_4 seems small. "<" 
[qrr_0142] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3 to obj_5 is moderate. "~="
[qrr_0143] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3 to obj_7 is moderate-large. "<"
[qrr_0144] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_4 to obj_5 is small-moderate. ">"
[qrr_0145] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 to obj_7 is large. "<"
[qrr_0146] obj_1-obj_6 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 to obj_7 moderate. "~="
[qrr_0147] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_1 to obj_7 moderate; obj_2 to obj_3 moderate. "~="
[qrr_0148] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 to obj_4 is large. "<"
[qrr_0149] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_2-obj_6: obj_2 to obj_6 moderate. "~="
[qrr_0150] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_3 to obj_4 small. ">"
[qrr_0151] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_5: moderate. "~="
[qrr_0152] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_3-obj_6: moderate-large. "<"
[qrr_0153] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_4-obj_5: small. ">"
[qrr_0154] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_4-obj_6: large. "<"
[qrr_0155] obj_1-obj_7 vs obj_5-obj_6: moderate. "~="
[qrr_0156] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_2-obj_3 moderate; obj_4-obj_5 small. ">"
[qrr_0157] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4-obj_6 large. "<"
[qrr_0158] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4-obj_7 large. "<"
[qrr_0159] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_5-obj_6: moderate vs moderate. "~="
[qrr_0160] obj_2-obj_3 vs obj_5-obj_7: moderate. "~="
